title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 22, 2023
summary: June 22 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a lower rate of 4.10% , from the level on 06/15/2023 of 10.995 M km 2 to 10.544 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory Data S...

title: Maeve and Quinn
summary: Maeve and Quinn are twins from Alaska who create musical magic. In this long-awaited show we take a deep dive into their artistry and unique sound.
